issues.description: Socket server bundling still has an uncopied runtime dependency: server/middleware/auth.ts imports ../../src/lib/auth-secret, but Dockerfile.socket only copies server/ plus selected src/features files. In the OCI build context, esbuild will not be able to resolve src/lib/auth-secret.ts. The deploy trigger also omits this file, so future changes to the socket auth helper would not redeploy the socket image.
issues.recommendation: Add src/lib/auth-secret.ts to Dockerfile.socket COPY inputs at the exact path resolved by server/middleware/auth.ts, and add the same file to deploy-socket.yml paths.

issues.description: The workspace WI ledger does not match the requested split WI: activeWI is WI-012-refactor and branch is develop, while this validation target is WI-012-1-refactor on refactor/WI-012-1-refactor-protocol-contract.
issues.recommendation: Update the active WI metadata to WI-012-1-refactor and the active branch before closing this validation record.
